title: Hightouch reaches $100M ARR fueled by marketing tools powered by AI
description: The startup says it grew its ARR by $70 million in just 20 months after launching an AI agent platform for marketers.

title: LinkedIn data shows AI isn’t to blame for hiring decline… yet
description: LinkedIn says hiring is down 20% since 2022, but blames higher interest rates — not AI — for the slowdown.

title: New teaser gives us first look at Godzilla Minus Zero
description: Director Takashi Yamazaki told Cinemacon attendees that sequel is first Japanese film shot for IMAX.

title: AI learning app Gizmo levels up with 13M users and a $22M investment
description: Gizmo, an AI-powered learning platform, has attracted more than 13 million users and just secured $22 million in Series A funding.

title: Vulcan woes will "absolutely" be a factor in Pentagon's next rocket competition
description: "If the spacecraft is ready to go, that's going to give it a priority."

title: Can AI judge journalism? A Thiel-backed startup says yes, even if it risks chilling whistleblowers
description: Objection, a Thiel-backed startup, aims to use AI to judge journalism, letting users pay to challenge stories. Critics warn it could chill whistleblowers and reshape how media accountability works.

title: Google rolls out a native Gemini app for Mac
description: You can share anything on their screen with Gemini to get help with what they're looking at in the moment, including local files.

title: AI Could Democratize One of Tech's Most Valuable Resources
description: AI is making it easier to design chips and optimize software for different silicon. Some startups envision a revolution in chipmaking.

title: FCC exempts Netgear from ban on foreign routers, doesn't explain why
description: Trump FCC starts handing out exemptions to its ban on foreign-made routers.

title: Adobe takes Creative Cloud into Claude Code-esque territory
description: This is a big step in a new strategic direction for Adobe.

title: US jobs too important to risk Chinese car imports, says Ford CEO
description: China has enough spare capacity to swallow the entire US car market, says Ford's Jim Farley.

title: Allbirds Is Pivoting to AI Compute. Sure, Why Not
description: Once a $4 billion apparel juggernaut, Allbirds will rebrand as NewBird AI, a “GPU-as-a-Service” company. Hey, if you can't beat ’em, join ’em.

title: The Download: NASA’s nuclear spacecraft and unveiling our AI 10

title: Cyberscammers are bypassing banks’ security with illicit tools sold on Telegram
description: From inside a money-laundering center in Cambodia, an employee opens a popular Vietnamese banking app on his phone. title: AI Slop Is Making the Internet Fake-Happy
description: A new study examines the impact of the rise of AI-generated websites on the internet—and found some surprising results.

title: The Deepfake Nudes Crisis in Schools Is Much Worse Than You Thought
description: An analysis by WIRED and Indicator found nearly 90 schools and 600 students around the world impacted by AI-generated deepfake nude images—and the problem shows no signs of going away.

title: No one’s sure if synthetic mirror life will kill us all
description: For four days in February 2019, some 30 synthetic biologists and ethicists hunkered down at a conference center in Northern Virginia to brainstorm high-risk, cutting-­edge, irresistibly exciting ideas that the National Science Foundation should fund. title: Building trust in the AI era with privacy-led UX
description: The practice of privacy-led user experience (UX) is a design philosophy that treats transparency around data collection and usage as an integral part of the customer relationship. An undertapped opportunity in digital marketing, privacy-led UX treats user consent not as a tick-box compliance exercis

title: Redefining the future of software engineering
description: Software engineering has experienced two seismic shifts this century. First was the rise of the open source movement, which gradually made code accessible to developers and engineers everywhere. title: How to Use Google Chrome’s New AI-Powered ‘Skills’
description: The premade Skills available through the Gemini sidebar in Chrome include ways to maximize protein in recipes or summarize YouTube videos.

title: Understanding Convolutions on Graphs
description: Understanding the building blocks and design choices of graph neural networks.

title: A Gentle Introduction to Graph Neural Networks
description: What components are needed for building learning algorithms that leverage the structure and properties of graphs?

title: Distill Hiatus
description: After five years, Distill will be taking a break.

title: Adversarial Reprogramming of Neural Cellular Automata
description: Reprogramming Neural CA to exhibit novel behaviour, using adversarial attacks.

title: Weight Banding
description: Weights in the final layer of common visual models appear as horizontal bands. We investigate how and why.
